text:
There once was a bunny who dreamed of the stars. Every night, she'd sneak out into the forest and listen. Oh! she loved those nights. There were thousands of stars just dancing together!

But sometimes she got scared. They're out last night! You go home...then...They saw you! But she didn't care at all. Just go back to bed! With that she'd head back to her cozy nest. 

But she loved them too. That's why she'd listen...All night long. Oh! Just like fireworks! That's my favorite! And then the stars would make...

Oh! A smile! Now they could!

And that was her favorite time. But she thought maybe...maybe she wanted those stars. Yeah! Just like them. Oh! That'd be nice.

They're hers! Wait! They're YOU! Just because? Oh! You're adorable! Just go home...yeah! Oh! Just wait till next night! Say goodbye! But
